working: transcodeToMp3() helper added to watcher (ffmpeg 320k, Promise-based)
/share-link: fire-and-forgets WAV→MP3 transcode after Dropbox link; returns mp3Path + mp3ShareLink
Audio serving (/production/, /mixing/, /audio/): prefers .mp3 over .wav when Accept: audio/mpeg
ProjectsTab sendToArtist: stores mp3ShareUrl in songs[], mp3_path in share_sessions
ProjectsTab production listen link: same mp3 fields stored
partial: Listen page (momentummusic.vercel.app) is a separate repo — NOT in /Users/remo/momentum. <source> tag update for MP3 preference needs to be done there.
mp3ShareLink is always null in share-link response currently — transcode is fire-and-forget so link is generated async after response. Songs[] has mp3ShareUrl=null until that separate step is wired.
notes: transcodeToMp3 is fire-and-forget — mp3ShareLink is not returned synchronously in /share-link response because the transcode takes time. To return the mp3 Dropbox link, the frontend would need to poll or the transcode needs to be awaited (adds ~5-10s to response). Currently mp3Path (filename only) is stored in share_sessions.mp3_path so the listen page can construct the URL if needed.
